title: Custom CMS (ARC) Development
productDescription: A bespoke Content Management System (ARC) built to power corporate websites and marketing operations, offering enhanced flexibility and internal control.
challenge: Reduce dependency on third-party vendors, enhance internal content management capabilities, and provide a scalable platform to support core marketing operations.
action: Led a team of overseas developers through the full product lifecycle, from roadmap creation to launch. Oversaw the architecture and development of the custom Content Management System (ARC).
results: Launched a robust CMS supporting marketing operations for a company with over $1 billion in annual revenue.
Enhanced lead generation and website traffic through improved platform scalability.
Minimized third-party vendor dependency, improving operational flexibility.

title: Corporate Websites Platform Development
productDescription: A suite of high-performance corporate websites designed to drive lead generation and enhance user engagement for Brightland Homes.
challenge: Develop new corporate websites that effectively support marketing operations, improve user engagement, and achieve high performance standards.
action: Spearheaded the development and launch of multiple custom corporate websites, focusing on UI/UX, technical implementation, and performance optimization strategies, often integrated with the ARC CMS.
results: Doubled PageSpeed Insights scores (e.g., 30 to 60 points for a key site).
Increased user engagement time by 40% on redesigned websites.
Contributed to the platform infrastructure supporting over $1 billion in annual revenue.
keyFeatures: Dynamic content driven by ARC CMS
Optimized for speed and user experience

title: Digital TV Signage Platform
productDescription: A modernized digital TV signage platform for sales centers, featuring interactive content, lead capture, and centralized management tools.
challenge: Overhaul an outdated, unstable TV signage platform reliant on obsolete technology and expensive hardware, which limited feature development and incurred high costs.
action: Researched and proposed a cost-effective mini PC solution. Rebuilt the TV signage website from scratch with modern architecture. Implemented QR code lead capture and admin tools for cross-selling. Architected hardware configurations for 150 touchscreen devices.
results: Saved $299,000 in hardware costs by switching to mini PCs.
Boosted lead generation by 8% through new website functionalities.
Eliminated previous hardware limitations, enabling new feature development and enhancing sales team capabilities.

title: Marketing Data & Integration Hub
productDescription: An integrated data hub connecting various marketing and sales platforms (HubSpot, Zillow, etc.) to enable dynamic advertising, unified reporting, and streamlined data workflows.
challenge: Streamline marketing/sales operations by enabling seamless data flow between critical platforms, improve reporting accuracy, and enhance dynamic advertising.
action: Engineered and implemented robust REST APIs (Node.js Express) to integrate key systems including HubSpot, Zillow, Realtor.com, Facebook (Dynamic Ads), Google Ads, and GA4. Mastered HubSpot API for advanced data manipulations.
results: Enhanced lead generation (e.g., +10% from specific dynamic landing page integrations).
Enabled dynamic advertising capabilities and synchronized data seamlessly.
Streamlined marketing workflows and provided advanced reporting.

title: HubSpot Programmable CRM Modules
productDescription: A set of custom-developed programmable modules and objects within HubSpot CRM, designed to automate marketing tasks and streamline internal workflows.
challenge: Improve marketing team efficiency by streamlining repetitive tasks and enhancing CRM functionalities within HubSpot.
action: Designed and developed programmable CRM modules and custom objects within HubSpot, including fully custom-coded programmable email modules for dynamic content and personalization. Automated inventory pricing emails.
results: Boosted marketing productivity by 15% (measured by campaign efficiency).
Optimized marketing team time by 10% via automation (e.g., inventory pricing emails).
Streamlined designer workflows and improved overall marketing team output.
keyFeatures: HubSpot custom objects for dynamic content
